items.title: Is it happening again? Arsenal's stumble in title race follows familiar pattern
items.description: Arsenal's Premier League championship charge suffered yet another wobble on Wednesday, leaving many Gunners fans to wonder: "Is it happening again?"

items.title: Premier League teams look to U.S. to raise transfer funds
items.description: With tighter financial regulations and rules on sponsors, clubs need new ways to raise cash.

items.title: 'Shoresy' hits the road with NHL superstars
items.description: The creator of the Hulu hit kept a diary of the live tour. He shares it ahead of the Season 5 U.S. debut.

items.title: What you need to know about college football's next top prospects
items.description: It's recruiting season for the 2027 class. The QB market is wide open while playoff teams are out to flip five-stars.

items.title: Don't be surprised if ...  Tyrese Maxey is top points scorer
items.description: Eric Karabell forecasts what to expect from notable players such as Tyrese Maxey, Jayson Tatum and more.
